title: Helicobacter pylori-specific genes in gastric biopsies of patients with autoimmune gastritis with and without gastric cancer.
abstract: Autoimmune gastritis(AIG), at increased gastric cancer(GC) risk, may be purely autoimmune or H.pylori -triggered. GC-risk in AIG may be H. pylori -related, but cannot be excluded in pure AIG. Distinguishing pure AIG( H.pylori- naïve) from that H.pylori- triggered is challenging. H.pylori -specific genes in AIG patients' gastric tissue have not yet been assessed. This study aimed to assess H.pylori -specific genes on DNA extracted from gastric biopsies in AIG patients with and without GC.
